headline: FNB Expands eStore: Will This Digital Transformation Support Growth?
summary: FNB expands its eStore Common app to include business loans, deepening its Clicks-to-Bricks digital strategy as online apps jump and AI speed up decisions.

headline: State Street Investment Management Launches Investment-Grade Public and Private ABS ETF
summary: BOSTON, March 11, 2026--State Street Investment Management today announced the launch of the State Street® IG Public & Private ABS ETF (PRAB), an actively managed exchange-traded fund designed to expand investor access to a rapidly growing, higher-quality segment of the global credit markets.

raw.headline: State Street Investment Management Launches Investment-Grade Public and Private ABS ETF
